headline: Unilateral child conversion ban enforcement lacking in 6 states
context: Despite the 2018 Federal Court ruling requiring both parents' consent for child conversion, 6 states had not amended their enactments by 2025.

cards.text: 6 states have not amended laws to comply with 2018 Indira Gandhi ruling
cards.sub: Unilateral child conversion still possible in states that ignore Federal Court

cards.h: Federal Court in Indira Gandhi 2018 ruled both parents must consent to conversion
cards.s: State syariah enactments in 6 states still permit single-parent conversion
cards.d: Federal Court in Indira Gandhi 2018 ruled both parents must consent to conversion State syariah enactments in 6 states still permit single-parent conversion

cards.h: Article 12(4) places a child's religion in the parent or guardian's hands until 18
cards.s: Indira Gandhi 2018 read 'parent' as both parents; 6 state enactments still allow one
